_metadata.consistent_attack_ip: 20.93.23.234 (used in 6/7 scenarios; sc5 uses 169.254.169.254 IMDS only)
_metadata.note_on_dedup: total_unique_ioc_records per scenario is the count of unique line numbers after within-file deduplication. Cross-file dedup is not applied since line numbers are file-specific.
_metadata.note_on_split_files: eve.json was shared across scenarios with multi-day data. Split by date: sc3_eve.json (2025-12-14), sc4_eve.json (2025-12-15), sc7_eve.json (2025-12-08). Line numbers reference the split files.
_metadata.line_indexing: All line numbers are 1-indexed. For CSV files line 1 is the header. For NDJSON (eve.json) line 1 is the first record.
